A C D E F G H I J K M P Q S T 

A

ACE - Static variable in class Card
 
addCards(LinkedList<Card>) - Method in class Player
Appends to the bottom of this Player's deck all of the Cards in order.

C

Card - Class in <Unnamed>
Represents an individual card in a standard 52-card deck (no jokers).
Card() - Constructor for class Card
Creates a new Ace of Spades Card.
Card(int, int) - Constructor for class Card
Creates a new Card with specified rank and suit.
Card(Card) - Constructor for class Card
Creates a new Card with the same rank and suit as another card.
CLUBS - Static variable in class Card
 
compareTo(Card) - Method in class Card
Compares two Cards' ranks.
createDeck(LinkedList<Card>) - Method in class Player
Instantiates this Player's deck if the list is currently empty.

D

deal() - Method in class Deck
Deals and removes one random Card from the Deck.
Dealer - Class in <Unnamed>
Utility class for managing a Deck and dealing the Cards from the Deck.
Dealer() - Constructor for class Dealer
Creates a new Dealer with a fresh Deck.
deals(int) - Method in class Dealer
Deals out multiple Cards from the Deck.
Deck - Class in <Unnamed>
Represents a standard deck of playing cards of variable size, implementing the Card class.
Deck() - Constructor for class Deck
Creates a new Deck with 52 Cards, sorted by suits and then by ranks (2 to ace).
Deck(Deck) - Constructor for class Deck
Creates a new Deck with the same Cards as the parameter Deck.
DIAMONDS - Static variable in class Card
 
Driver - Class in <Unnamed>
Creates objects to simulate the gameplay of one game of Egyptian Rat Screw.
Driver() - Constructor for class Driver
 

E

equals(Card) - Method in class Card
Compares two Cards' ranks.

F

findPlayerByNum(LinkedList<Player>, int) - Static method in class Player
Searches a LinkedList of Players for the Player with the specified position.

G

Game - Class in <Unnamed>
Represents the state and gameplay of a game of Egyptian Rat Screw.
Game() - Constructor for class Game
Sets up a new Game with 2 Players.
Game(int) - Constructor for class Game
Sets up a new Game with the specified number of Players.
getCurPlayer() - Method in class Game
Get the Player whose turn it currently is.
getCurPlayerIndex() - Method in class Game
Get the index in the list of Players corresponding to the Player whose turn it is.
getDealer() - Method in class Game
Get the Dealer object dealing this Game.
getDeck() - Method in class Player
Get the set of Cards that this player is currently holding.
getPattern() - Method in class Player
Get the slapping pattern that this Player is watching for.
getPile() - Method in class Game
Get the Cards currently in the center of the table.
getPlayerNum() - Method in class Player
Gets the position of this Player in the turn order.
getPlayers() - Method in class Game
Get the list of Players in this Game.
getRank() - Method in class Card
Get the rank (number) of this Card.
getSuit() - Method in class Card
Get the suit of this Card.

H

HEARTS - Static variable in class Card
 

I

isFaceCard() - Method in class Card
Check the rank of this Card.
isMarriage(LinkedList<Card>) - Static method in class Game
Checks if there is a marriage on top of the pile.
isNumberCard() - Method in class Card
Check the rank of this Card.
isPair(LinkedList<Card>) - Static method in class Game
Checks if there is a pair on top of the pile.
isSandwich(LinkedList<Card>) - Static method in class Game
Checks if there is a sandwich on top of the pile.
isTopBottom(LinkedList<Card>) - Static method in class Game
Checks if there is a top-bottom in the pile.

J

JACK - Static variable in class Card
 

K

KING - Static variable in class Card
 

M

main(String[]) - Static method in class Driver
 

P

play(PrintWriter) - Method in class Game
Plays through this Game of Egyptian Rat Screw according to the rules until only one Player is left.
playCard() - Method in class Player
Removes and returns the top Card from this Player's deck.
Player - Class in <Unnamed>
Represents one player in a game of Egyptian Rat Screw with their position in turn order and current deck.
Player(int, String) - Constructor for class Player
Creates a new Player object with an empty deck.
Player(int, String, LinkedList<Card>) - Constructor for class Player
Creates a new Player object.

Q

QUEEN - Static variable in class Card
 

S

setRank(int) - Method in class Card
Set the rank (number) of this Card.
setSuit(int) - Method in class Card
Set the suit of this Card.
size() - Method in class Dealer
 
size() - Method in class Deck
Get the number of cards in the Deck.
slaps(LinkedList<Card>) - Method in class Player
Determines whether or not the Player should slap this pile based on the pattern they are watching for.
SPADES - Static variable in class Card
 

T

toString() - Method in class Card
Returns a String representation of this Card, in the form "[rank] of [suit]".
toString() - Method in class Dealer
 
toString() - Method in class Deck
Turns the Deck into a String, listing each Card inside square brackets separated by commas.
toString() - Method in class Player
Get this Player in String format.
